caption:
Your website can answer customer questions at 2am. While you sleep.

AI chatbots trained on your business — your services, your pricing, your hours, your FAQ — in English, French, and Kreol.

A customer lands on your site at midnight. They have a question. Instead of clicking away, they get an answer. They book. You wake up with a lead.

That's what Grand Baie includes. Rs 35,000.

→ bienzoli.com

#AIChatbot #MauritiusBusiness #BusinessAutomation #bienzoli #SmallBusinessTech

templateData.headline: Your 24/7 employee.
templateData.body: AI chatbots trained on your services, pricing, FAQ — in EN, FR, and Kreol. A customer lands at 2am, gets their answer, books. You wake up with a lead.
